LOC_1: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - Whether or not I get to be a leader depends mostly on my ability.
LOC_2: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - To a great extent my life is controlled by accidental happenings.
LOC_3: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - I feel like what happens in my life is mostly determined by people in authority.
LOC_4: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - Whether or not I get injured depends mostly on how careful I am.
LOC_5: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - When I make plans, I am almost certain to make them work.
LOC_6: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - Often there is no chance of protecting my personal interests from bad luck happenings.
LOC_7: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - When I get what I want, it’s usually because I’m lucky.
LOC_8: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - Although I might have good ability, I will not be given leadership responsibility without appealing to those in positions of power.
LOC_9: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - How many friends I have depends on how nice a person I am.
LOC_10: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - I have often found that what is going to happen will happen, no matter what anyone does to try to change it.
LOC_11: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - My life is chiefly controlled by powerful other people.
LOC_12: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - Whether or not I get injured is mostly a matter of luck.
LOC_13: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - People like myself have very little chance of protecting our personal interests when they conflict with those of strong pressure groups.
LOC_14: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - It’s not always wise for me to plan too far ahead because many things turn out to be a matter of good or bad fortune.
LOC_15: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - Getting what I want requires pleasing those people above me.
LOC_16: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - Whether or not I get to be a leader depends on whether I’m lucky enough to be in the right place at the right time.
LOC_17: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - If important people were to decide they didn’t like me, I probably wouldn’t make many friends.
LOC_18: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - I can pretty much determine what will happen in my life.
LOC_19: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - I am usually able to protect my personal interests.
LOC_20: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - Whether or not I get into a car accident would depend mostly on the other driver.
LOC_21: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - When I get what I want, it’s usually because I worked hard for it.
LOC_22: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - In order to have my plans work, I make sure that they fit in with the desires of people who have power over me.
LOC_23: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - My life is determined by my own actions.
LOC_24: Answer each of the following items by selecting the point that best describes your thinking most of the time. - It’s chiefly a matter of fate whether or not I have a few friends or many friends.
